query:
INSERT INTO skill_areas (sectorId, name, code, description, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES
-- ICT (sector 1)
(1, 'Software Development', 'ICT-SD', 'Application development, web development, mobile apps, and software engineering practices.', true, 1),
(1, 'Networking and Infrastructure', 'ICT-NI', 'Network administration, cloud computing, server management, and IT infrastructure.', true, 2),
(1, 'Cybersecurity', 'ICT-CS', 'Information security, ethical hacking, risk management, and security operations.', true, 3),
(1, 'IT Support and Services', 'ICT-IT', 'Help desk support, hardware maintenance, troubleshooting, and IT service management.', true, 4),
(1, 'Digital Media and Design', 'ICT-DM', 'Web design, UX/UI, digital content creation, and multimedia production.', true, 5),
(1, 'Data Science and Analytics', 'ICT-DA', 'Data analysis, machine learning, business intelligence, and database management.', true, 6),
-- MET (sector 2)
(2, 'Mechanical Engineering', 'MET-ME', 'Mechanical design, CAD/CAM, precision machining, and manufacturing processes.', true, 1),
(2, 'Welding and Fabrication', 'MET-WF', 'Welding techniques, metal fabrication, structural welding, and quality inspection.', true, 2),
(2, 'Electronics and Electrical', 'MET-EE', 'Electronic systems, PCB design, automation, and electrical installations.', true, 3),
(2, 'Industrial Automation', 'MET-IA', 'PLC programming, robotics, CNC operations, and automated manufacturing systems.', true, 4),
(2, 'Quality Assurance', 'MET-QA', 'Quality control, inspection methods, metrology, and manufacturing standards.', true, 5),
-- CAF (sector 3)
(3, 'Graphic Design and Visual Arts', 'CAF-GD', 'Graphic design, illustration, branding, print production, and visual communication.', true, 1),
(3, 'Fashion Technology', 'CAF-FT', 'Garment construction, pattern making, textile knowledge, and fashion design.', true, 2),
(3, 'Hairdressing and Beauty', 'CAF-HB', 'Hair styling, coloring, beauty therapy, nail technology, and esthetics.', true, 3),
(3, 'Floristry and Horticulture', 'CAF-FH', 'Floral design, plant care, landscape design, and horticultural practices.', true, 4),
(3, 'Photography and Videography', 'CAF-PV', 'Photography, video production, editing, and visual storytelling.', true, 5),
-- HSC (sector 4)
(4, 'Nursing and Patient Care', 'HSC-NC', 'Clinical nursing, patient assessment, medication administration, and care planning.', true, 1),
(4, 'Health and Social Care Practice', 'HSC-HS', 'Social care, community health, disability support, and aged care services.', true, 2),
(4, 'Dental Technology', 'HSC-DT', 'Dental prosthetics, orthodontic appliances, and dental laboratory techniques.', true, 3),
(4, 'Pharmacy Services', 'HSC-PS', 'Pharmaceutical dispensing, medication management, and pharmacy operations.', true, 4),
(4, 'Health Information Management', 'HSC-HI', 'Medical records, health data management, coding, and health informatics.', true, 5),
-- CBT (sector 5)
(5, 'Carpentry and Joinery', 'CBT-CJ', 'Wood construction, furniture making, cabinetry, and finishing techniques.', true, 1),
(5, 'Plumbing and Heating', 'CBT-PH', 'Plumbing installation, pipe fitting, HVAC systems, and sanitary works.', true, 2),
(5, 'Electrical Installation', 'CBT-EI', 'Electrical wiring, panel installation, lighting systems, and electrical safety.', true, 3),
(5, 'Masonry and Tiling', 'CBT-MT', 'Bricklaying, concrete work, tile installation, and stone masonry.', true, 4),
(5, 'Painting and Decorating', 'CBT-PD', 'Surface preparation, painting techniques, wallpapering, and decorative finishes.', true, 5),
(5, 'Building Information Modeling', 'CBT-BIM', 'BIM software, 3D modeling, construction documentation, and project coordination.', true, 6),
-- TL (sector 6)
(6, 'Automotive Technology', 'TL-AT', 'Vehicle diagnostics, engine repair, transmission, and automotive electrical systems.', true, 1),
(6, 'Aviation Maintenance', 'TL-AM', 'Aircraft maintenance, avionics, airframe and powerplant systems, and aviation safety.', true, 2),
(6, 'Freight and Logistics', 'TL-FL', 'Freight forwarding, customs procedures, warehousing, and supply chain operations.', true, 3),
(6, 'Heavy Vehicle and Equipment', 'TL-HV', 'Heavy machinery operation, maintenance, and construction equipment management.', true, 4),
(6, 'Marine Technology', 'TL-MT', 'Marine engineering, vessel maintenance, navigation systems, and maritime operations.', true, 5);
